channel.title: privesc on Natan Maia Morette
channel.description: Recent content in privesc on Natan Maia Morette

item.title: TryHackme - Steel Mountain - Write Up
item.description: Task 1. Introduction Let’s open the web page: Take a look at the source code: Who is the employee of the month? Bill Harper Task 2. Inicial Access First of all, let’s nmap the machine IP. nmap -sS -A 10.10.169.181 -Pn Scan the machine with nmap. What is the other port running a web server on? Nmap gives this answer: 8080 Take a look at the other web server.
